name: Barri Agent
description_short: Barri offers check cashing, money transfers, bill payments, and a prepaid Visa debit card with over 30 years of experience serving remittance needs.
description_long:
Barri is an established financial services company with more than 30 years of experience in money transfer and remittance services. The company operates a network of physical locations alongside a digital platform, positioning itself as a comprehensive financial service provider for underbanked and immigrant communities, particularly those sending money to Latin America and the Caribbean.

Barri's core offerings include check cashing with extended hours and transparent fees, domestic and international money transfers via online, mobile app, or in-store, bill payment services, mobile phone recharges across the US and Latin America, and a Barri Visa debit card for account management and fund access. They also partner with Oportun to provide personal loans ranging from $300 to $10,000, allowing customers to build credit history while accessing emergency funds.

The company differentiates itself through its user-friendly mobile application (available on iOS and Android), extended store hours for check cashing, competitive pricing, and deep integration into Latin American money transfer corridors. Their 4.9-star app rating and customer testimonials emphasize ease of use, reliability, and responsive customer service. The combination of physical locations and digital-first tools allows customers flexibility in how they access services.

Barri is best suited for immigrants and their families who regularly send remittances, need check cashing without a traditional bank account, and want to manage multiple financial tasks (transfers, bill payments, mobile recharges) from a single platform. The company's primary limitation is its reliance on a physical store network for some services, and personal loans are limited to a maximum of $10,000, which may be insufficient for larger financial needs.
pros: Extended check cashing hours with transparent, competitive fees
4.9-star rating on app stores with verified customer reviews praising ease of use
Integrated mobile app enabling money transfers, bill payments, and mobile recharges from phone
Over 30 years of established experience in remittance and money transfer services
Personal loans up to $10,000 via Oportun partnership to help build credit history
Barri Visa debit card for secure fund management and bill payments
Multi-country money transfer capabilities to Mexico, Central America, and South America
cons: Check cashing and some services require visiting a physical store location
Personal loans capped at $10,000, limiting options for larger borrowing needs
No information on check cashing fees provided on website despite claiming 'convenient rates'
Limited detail on loan approval criteria or credit requirements for Oportun partnership
Service availability dependent on physical store network geography
best_for: Immigrants and expatriates regularly sending money to Latin America or the Caribbean
Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing check cashing without a traditional bank account
Families managing multiple remittance and bill payment needs in one platform
Consumers seeking to build credit history with small personal loans
diagnosis: Barri is ideal for immigrants and unbanked consumers needing integrated check cashing, money transfers, and bill payment services with a strong digital component. The primary caveat is that full service access requires proximity to a physical store location, and borrowing is limited to $10,000 through their Oportun partnership.
services: International money transfers to Latin America and the Caribbean
Mobile phone recharges (US and Latin America)
